name: Fen Caldra
excerpt: A careful and discreet operator of a private transport service.
notes: Fen Caldra is in his mid-40s, born in Tiveck, and has spent his life near the waterfront. He operates a small private transport service with two vessels and a trusted crew. Known for reliability and discretion, he uses the Salt Warren for gray-market storage. He discovered the Sunken Ledger six years ago and has kept it hidden. Fen has leverage over Orris Vane through a forged customs document and finds Maren Ashveil intriguing, suspecting she seeks the Ledger.
